comment.body:
i launched a referral program for the substack.
i'm not quite sure i fully understand how it works, but the key is that if you can get 5+ subs, you get 1-to-6 month free.

Also, today i elevate the price from 35 eur to 52 eur
and so do with the yearly.
your plan won't be affected, it is only for the new comers. 
however, i set a discount that brings back the eurlier price now, as it is anniversary.

After the market close, i will put it all down in email. :))

...i just started to enjoy to do this btw :))
